predictions.description: ignoreErrors buries a failure and continues to the next sibling; a failure inside an error-handler skips the handler's remaining children (no 'in-handler-after') and resumes at the handler's first sibling; a clean handler runs all children. Exact crumb order proves all three.
error-handler statusVariable (boolean) flips to true when a child fails without ignoreErrors
error-handler initializes its statusVariable to false ON ENTRY — a parm pre-set to true must read false after a clean handler run
handler surfaces the caught error's message via its errorMessage step-output variable
handler surfaces the failing step's name via its errorStepName step-output variable

equals: failing step inside handler (missing list variable)
